title: Inventory Item Counts
description: This project is created for Inventory Item Counts mod.
body:
# Inventory Item Counter

## Description

This mod counts the total number of items in your inventory and chests. The number displayed in () is the number you have out of the total number.

![Useage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/821c245d857880024cec3156645ac88fb6d5c8aa.png)
